items.title: RSV Hits Harder in Kids With Asthma
items.description: Tests of tissue models show faster spread of virus in children with asthma than in nonasthma control participants. Medscape Medical News

items.title: PREVENT Calculator Underestimates CVD Risk in Some Adults
items.description: A new study raises concerns that the PREVENT calculator may underestimate cardiovascular risk in some young adult populations. Medscape Medical News
